name: CI Resources Limited
summary: CI Resources Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in mining, processing, and sale of phosphate rock, phosphate dust, and chalk in Australia, Malaysia, and Singapore. It operates through Mining and Farming segments. The company also provides earthmoving, fuel pilotage, maintenance, and stevedoring services to other organizations in Christmas Island; operates a palm oil estate; and processes and sells palm oil products. In addition, it offers shipping services; and fuel and marketing services. The company exports its phosphate products to New Zealand, Malaysia, Thailand, and Indonesia. The company was incorporated in 1987 and is based in Burswood, Australia.
